name: Antti Sarpila
abstract: Antti Juhani Sarpila (born 11 June 1964) is a Finnish jazz clarinetist. He performed in a Benny Goodman-inspired style and studied under Bob Wilber.

concerts.label: 50th Anniversary of Benny Goodman's 1938 Carnegie Hall Concert
Swedish Jazz Salutes USA
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Pug Horton
about_quotes.evidence: We had sets with Dave McKenna and Dick Hyman, Antti Sarpila, we had wonderful people.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pug Horton interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 1998
